name_en: 🆕 [Top-tier Original] M11631 Wallet 👏👏 Made of Monogram Dust canvas, giving the Monogram pattern an elegant faded look, showcasing Pharrell Williams' reinterpretation of classic elements. Features a retro Marque L.vuitton Déposé logo on the front, paying homage to the brand's heritage. Dimensions: 7.5x11.1x1.
